nodes.label: Last-super-admin self-demote guard
nodes.rationale: Prevents the sole remaining super admin from removing their own super-admin role (toggle disabled, warning shown) so the org is never left without a super admin; super-admin grant/revoke also requires confirmation and is recorded in the audit log.

nodes.label: Cochran's sample-size formula (finite population correction)
nodes.rationale: Used so admins don't have to survey every attendee — a randomly-chosen subset, sized by desired confidence and margin of error, represents the group; falls back to surveying everyone when the population is small (<=20 or sample >= population).

nodes.label: Font-gated render pattern
nodes.rationale: Mounts the React app only after Unna + Source Sans fonts finish loading (with a 2.5s safety timeout) to avoid a flash of the wider fallback serif (Georgia) which causes transient text wraps/overlap.

nodes.label: Gioia et al. (2013), Organizational identity formation and change
IDEO.org (2015), The Field Guide to Human-Centered Design
Cummings & Worley (2014), Organization Development and Change
Lewin, K. (1947), Frontiers in Group Dynamics
Liquid glass visual recipe (blur+tint+shine)
nodes.rationale: Shared backdrop-filter blur+saturate, translucent tint, and inset shine/border combination reused across IOSGlassPill and IOSKeyboard to emulate iOS 26 'Liquid Glass' material consistently.

hyperedges.label: Studio design showcase composing browser and iOS device frames around the portal
Guided tour definitions, runtime overlay, and Settings restart trigger
